name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature

## Feature summary

Describe the requested feature.

## Why is it useful?

Explain how this would improve ARG lookup, dataset indexing, interpretation, documentation, or deployment.

## Suggested behavior

Describe how the feature should work.

## Data considerations

Does the feature require public data, private score-table access, or synthetic examples only?

## Additional notes

Add any relevant details.
